cards.title: User Authentication
cards.description: Email/password sign-up, magic links, and OAuth with Google and GitHub. Includes session management and password reset flow.

cards.title: Dashboard MVP
cards.description: Landing screen after login — shows assigned tasks, recent activity, and upcoming deadlines at a glance.

months.th: กุมภาพันธ์

cards.title: Task CRUD API
cards.description: REST endpoints for creating, reading, updating, and deleting tasks with full permission checks and audit logging.

cards.title: Mobile App Scaffold
cards.description: Initial React Native project with navigation, shared component library, and CI pipeline for iOS and Android builds.

cards.title: Team Workspaces
cards.description: Multi-tenant workspaces with role-based access control. Users can belong to multiple workspaces and switch between them seamlessly.

cards.title: Onboarding Flow
cards.description: Guided first-run experience that helps new users create their first project, invite teammates, and learn core shortcuts.

cards.title: Kanban Board
cards.description: Drag-and-drop board view with customizable columns, swim lanes, and WIP limits. Supports keyboard shortcuts for power users.

cards.title: Real-time Collaboration
cards.description: Live cursors, presence indicators, and conflict-free edits powered by CRDTs so teams can co-edit tasks without stepping on each other.

cards.title: Slack Integration
cards.description: Two-way sync between TaskFlow tasks and Slack threads. Mentions, status changes, and comments flow between both tools.

cards.title: Recurring Tasks
cards.description: Schedule tasks that repeat daily, weekly, monthly, or on custom cron patterns. Supports skip and snooze options per occurrence.

cards.title: Time Tracking
cards.description: Built-in timer on every task plus manual time entry. Reports group by project, person, or tag with CSV export.

cards.title: Custom Fields
cards.description: Admins can define additional fields (text, number, date, select) on tasks and use them to filter and group views.

cards.title: Public API v1
cards.description: Stable REST and GraphQL API with documented schema, rate limits, and SDKs for JavaScript, Python, and Go.

cards.title: Webhook Support
cards.description: Outgoing webhooks for task events with retry, signing, and a delivery log UI so teams can debug their integrations.

cards.title: AI Task Suggestions
cards.description: Context-aware AI assistant that proposes sub-tasks, drafts descriptions, and flags duplicates based on team history.

cards.title: Automations Engine
cards.description: No-code if-this-then-that rules for moving tasks, assigning owners, and sending notifications when conditions are met.

cards.title: Native Desktop Apps
cards.description: Tauri-based desktop apps for macOS, Windows, and Linux with global shortcuts, menu bar quick-add, and offline queue.

cards.title: Offline Mode
cards.description: Local-first sync so users can read and edit tasks on flaky networks. Conflicts resolved with last-writer-wins plus manual merge.

cards.title: Q3 Retro & FY Planning
cards.description: Review KPIs from H1, gather feedback from customers and the team, and draft the Q4–Q1 2027 roadmap.

cards.title: Multi-region Architecture
cards.description: Evaluate active-active Postgres, edge caching, and regional queues to keep latency low for teams outside North America.
